# Mark Ross Junkans - Author & Entrepreneur

> Entrepreneur, author, and advocate for business as mission. Partner in ventures spanning AI consultancy, international project development, the energy industry, coffee roasting, and Christian mission work.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://markrossjunkans.com/): Author homepage — books, bio, and latest work
- [Books](https://markrossjunkans.com/books): All books by Mark Ross Junkans
- [About](https://markrossjunkans.com/about): Bio, ventures, and social links
- [Speaking & Media](https://markrossjunkans.com/speaking): Speaking engagements on faith, technology, and AI
- [Writing](https://markrossjunkans.com/writing): Newsletter and articles (coming soon)
- [Store](https://markrossjunkans.com/store): Digital resources for pastors, entrepreneurs, and mission leaders
- [Contact](https://markrossjunkans.com/contact): Booking and inquiries

## Books

- The Return of Mystery: Faith In An Age of Machines (ISBN: 978-8-2955-3249-8)
- 3 Verses a Day: 30 Days to Deepen Your Relationship with God
- 3 Verses a Day: Trust in God
- Your AI Employee: How to Build a 24/7 Personal AI Assistant That Actually Does Things

## Connected Ventures

- [Advira.ai](https://advira.ai) — AI consulting and implementation firm (Managing Partner)
- Spur Coffee — Specialty coffee roasting
- Flagship — International project development & energy
- LINC Ministries — Church planting among immigrant & refugee communities
